title: Extra Select Gravy Bones Beef Flavoured Dog Treat Biscuits in a 1ltr Bucket (approx 110 biscuits)
features: Enhance Their Learning: Ideal for both puppy training treats from 12 weeks and adult dog treats for training, making every session rewarding
Complementary Dog Treat: These dog bones have 10% protein and are great for all breeds, from dog treats for medium dogs to large dog treats.
Delightful Crunch: Crunchy dog biscuits treats that dogs adore; these dog gravy bones offer a satisfying crunch that's perfect as bedtime biscuits for dogs or a midday snack.
Beef Flavour: These rich beef bones offer rich flavour in every bite, perfect high value dog training treats to get and keep their interest.
Resealable for Freshness: Each little bone will stay tasting delicious, and you can reuse the tub for other dog biscuits and treats, minimising waste.
description: From the manufacturer Extra Select - Beef Gravy Bones How to Feed? These Gravy Bones are suitable for dogs over 12 weeks of age and serve as an excellent snack or training reward. To ensure a balanced diet, adjust your dog's meal portions accordingly. Always provide fresh drinking water and store the treats in a cool, dry place for maximum freshness. Nutrition Crude Protein 10%, Crude Protein 11%, Crude Fibre 2.5%, Crude Fat 8%, Crude Ash 5% Cereals, Meat and Animal Derivatives (3% meat meal), Oils & Fats, Derivatives of Vegetable Origin, Minerals Tips for Treats Supervised Snacking: Watch your dog while they enjoy their Gravy Bones. Balanced Diet: Remember, treats should only be a small part of a balanced diet. Age Appropriate: Suitable for dogs over 12 weeks old. Irresistible Flavour Your dog will relish the deep, meaty richness of our Beef Gravy Bones. Made with a blend of natural flavours, these treats offer a sumptuous beefy experience that will leave your canine companion wagging for more. Nutritionally Valuable With a good balance of crude protein and fats, Gravy Bones contribute to your dog's daily nutrient intake. They contain 11% protein, complemented by a 8% fat content for satiety and coat health. Convenient Training Aid Gravy Bones are more than just a tasty treat; they also serve as a helpful training aid. The convenient shape makes them easy to carry and dispense, making your training sessions as smooth as possible.
